title: Larryleachia dinteri
taxonomy: Larryleachia dinteri is a species of plant in the Asclepiadaceae family, which is now commonly referred to as Apocynaceae. This family of plants is commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. The genus Larryleachia is a small group of succulent plants native to southern Africa, specifically in the Namib Desert.
